title: pityrogramma triangularis subsp. maxonii
intro: Pityrogramma triangularis subsp. maxonii, also known as Maxon's Pityrogramma, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Pityrogramma triangularis subsp. maxonii include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing. Pityrogramma triangularis subsp. maxonii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
